C

calculate(VisitType, boolean, int, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in class server.control.PricingService
Computes the total price for a party.
callerFrame() - Static method in class server.util.ServerLog
The frame that called ServerLog.daoError(Throwable).
canCancel(ReservationStatus) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Cancel is legal from PENDING, CONFIRMED or WAITING (mirrors the server rule).
cancel(int) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Cancels a reservation after a Yes/No prompt, then refreshes the list.
CANCEL_RESERVATION - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Cancel a reservation.
cancellations(String, String, Integer) - Method in class server.dao.ReportDAO
Cancellations report: a per-day breakdown of cancelled and no-show reservations over a date range, optionally narrowed to a single park, with range totals and a daily average.
cancellationsReport(String, String, Integer) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Runs the Cancellations report (DEPT_MANAGER only — the server re-checks the role).
CancellationsReportController - Class in client.view
Cancellations report screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
CancellationsReportController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Creates the cancellations-report controller.
CancellationsReportController.ParkOption - Record Class in client.view
Park dropdown entry: carries the id (null for "All parks") but renders the name.
CancellationsReportDTO - Class in common.dto
Result of the Cancellations report: a per-day breakdown of cancelled and no-show reservations over a date range, optionally narrowed to one park, with range totals and a daily average.
CancellationsReportDTO(String, String, Integer, List<CancellationsReportRow>, int, int, double) - Constructor for class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Creates a fully populated cancellations report.
CancellationsReportRow - Class in common.dto
One per-day row of the Cancellations report: how many reservations were cancelled and how many were marked no-show on a single calendar day.
CancellationsReportRow(String, int, int) - Constructor for class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow
Creates a fully populated per-day row.
cancelled - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow
Reservations cancelled (ReservationStatus.CANCELLED) that day.
CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ReservationStatus
Cancelled by the visitor or staff.
cancelReservation(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Cancels a PENDING/CONFIRMED/WAITING reservation (server enforces the legal transition).
canEdit(ReservationStatus) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Edit (reschedule) is legal only from PENDING or CONFIRMED (mirrors the server rule).
card - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
The wizard card swapped in for the list.
cardHeaderLabel - Variable in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Header label showing the pending count.
cardHeaderLabel - Variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Header label showing the day count.
cardHeaderLabel - Variable in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Header label showing total/unread counts.
cardHeaderLabel - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
Header label of the results card showing the current visitor.
cardHeaderLabel - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Header label showing entry/offer counts.
CASUAL_VISIT - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Record a casual walk-in visit at the gate.
casualBtn - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual entry: admit walk-in button.
casualConfirmBox - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual entry: server-priced ticket confirmation panel.
casualExitBtn - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual exit: record-exit button.
casualExitResult - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual exit: result/toast label.
casualExitTicketField - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual exit: ticket-number input.
casualPartySpinner - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual entry: party-size spinner.
casualResult - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual entry: result/toast label.
casualTypeCombo - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual entry: visit-type dropdown.
casualVisit(int, VisitType, Long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Records a casual walk-in at the employee's park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
casualVisitorField - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Casual entry: optional visitor-id input.
CAT_GROUPS - Static variable in class client.view.VisitsReportController
X-axis category label for organized group visits.
CAT_INDIVIDUALS - Static variable in class client.view.VisitsReportController
X-axis category label for individual + family visits (also the bar order).
category - Variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Visitor category: "INDIVIDUALS" or "GROUPS".
cb - Variable in class client.net.EventBus.Subscription
The registered callback.
cell(String, double) - Method in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Builds a fixed-width data cell.
cell(String, double) - Method in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Builds a fixed-width row cell.
cell(String, String, double) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Builds a fixed-width data cell.
cell(String, String, double) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Builds a fixed-width data cell.
changeDao - Variable in class server.control.ParkController
Parameter-change-request data access (the approval workflow).
ChangeStatus - Enum Class in common.dto
Lifecycle status of a parameter_change_request.
ChangeStatus() - Constructor for enum class common.dto.ChangeStatus
 
channel - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Delivery channel: "SIM_EMAIL", "SIM_SMS", or "POPUP".
chart - Variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Grouped bar chart of cancelled/no-show counts per day.
chart - Variable in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Bar chart of visit counts per category.
CHECK_AVAILABILITY - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Check booking availability for a park/date.
clearForm() - Method in class client.view.GuideRegisterController
Resets the form after a successful registration so the rep can add another.
clearForm() - Method in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Resets the form after a successful registration so the rep can add another.
clearIdentity() - Method in class client.app.Session
Drops the logged-in identity (on logout) so the next user starts clean.
clickHitButton(Object) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
True if the click landed on a Button (or a node inside one), so the row's click handler should defer to that button's own action instead of opening the detail view.
client.app - package client.app
Client-side application scaffolding: screen navigation and the in-memory session.
client.boundary - package client.boundary
Client JavaFX entry point: the Application subclass that boots the GoNature client, builds the primary stage, and hands control to the navigator and the first view.
client.net - package client.net
Client networking: the persistent TCP connection to the server and the event bus that delivers server-pushed real-time updates.
client.service - package client.service
Client service layer: a typed facade over the raw connection.
client.view - package client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
clientByIp - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Index of client rows by IP, so reconnects update the existing row.
ClientConnection - Class in client.net
Persistent TCP connection to the GoNature server with async request/response correlation and unsolicited-event support.
ClientConnection(String, int) - Constructor for class client.net.ClientConnection
Creates an unconnected client connection; call ClientConnection.connect() to open it.
ClientConnection.ConnectionClosedException - Exception Class in client.net
Surfaces a connection drop to any thread waiting in ClientConnection.sendRequest(ClientRequest) as a typed IOException so callers can distinguish it from generic stream failures.
ClientRequest - Class in common.dto
Represents a request sent from the client to the server.
ClientRequest(RequestType) - Constructor for class common.dto.ClientRequest
Creates a new request with the given type.
ClientRow(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Creates a client table row.
clients - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Backing list of connected-client rows for the table.
ClientSession - Class in server.net
Per-connection server-side state for one client.
ClientSession(Socket, ObjectInputStream, ObjectOutputStream) - Constructor for class server.net.ClientSession
Wraps an already-connected socket and its already-constructed object streams.
close() - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Closes the connection and shuts the reader thread down cleanly.
close() - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Closes the streams and the socket.
closeConnection() - Method in class client.app.Session
Closes the active connection, if any (called on logout/shutdown).
closeVisit(int) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Closes an open visit by stamping exited_at = NOW().
columnFor(ParamField) - Static method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Maps a ParamField to its park column name.
COLUMNS - Static variable in class server.dao.ParkDAO
The columns selected by every park query, in ParkDAO.map(java.sql.ResultSet) order.
COLUMNS - Static variable in class server.dao.VisitDAO
The visit columns selected by every query, in VisitDAO.map(java.sql.ResultSet) order.
common.dto - package common.dto
Serializable data transfer objects and enums shared by client and server.
COMPLETED - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ReservationStatus
The visit happened and was checked out.
confirm(int) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Confirms a reservation after a Yes/No prompt, then refreshes the list.
CONFIRM_RESERVATION - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Confirm a pending reservation.
CONFIRM_TIMEOUT_MINUTES - Static variable in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
Minutes a PENDING reservation may sit before auto-expiry.
confirmAction(String, String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Shows a blocking Yes/No confirmation and returns true only if the user clicked Yes.
confirmAction(String, String) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Shows a blocking Yes/No confirmation and returns true only if the user clicked Yes.
confirmationBox - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Server-priced payment confirmation panel.
confirmationCode - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Booking confirmation code, or null if not yet issued.
CONFIRMED - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ReservationStatus
Confirmed and counted against park capacity.
confirmReservation(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Confirms a PENDING reservation (server enforces the legal transition).
ConfirmTimeoutJob - Class in server.scheduler
Auto-cancels reminded PENDING reservations that were not confirmed within the window.
ConfirmTimeoutJob(Consumer<String>) - Constructor for class server.scheduler.ConfirmTimeoutJob
Creates the job with a sink for its one-line run summaries.
connDot - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Connection-status indicator dot.
connect() - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Opens the socket and the object streams, then spawns the reader thread.
CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS - Static variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
Socket connect timeout, in milliseconds.
connectedAt - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
The time the client connected.
connectedAtProperty() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
The time the client connected.
connection - Variable in class client.app.Session
The active server connection, or null before connecting.
connection - Variable in class client.service.NetworkService.ProbeResult
The opened connection on success, or null on failure.
ConnectionClosedException(String) - Constructor for exception class client.net.ClientConnection.ConnectionClosedException
Creates the exception with a description of the drop.
connectThen(Runnable) - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
PING-probes the entered host:port and, on success, promotes the connection into the Session and runs after (the credential submit).
connHostLbl - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Connected host:port label.
connStatusLbl - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Connection-status text ("Connected"/"Disconnected").
contentArea - Variable in class client.app.Navigator
The pane screens are swapped into.
contentArea - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Center content area screens are swapped into.
contentNode() - Method in class client.app.Navigator
Returns the content pane this navigator swaps screens into.
controllers - Variable in class server.net.RequestRouter
Dispatch map from request type to the controller that handles it.
correlationCounter - Variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
Allocates correlation ids (starts at 1; 0 is the unset sentinel).
correlationId - Variable in class common.dto.ClientRequest
Client-assigned id used to match the server's response to this request.
correlationId - Variable in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Echoes the request's correlation id so the client can match the reply.
countdown - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Drives the one-second countdown refresh; stopped on hide.
CREATE_RESERVATION - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Create a new reservation.
created(String, long, Serializable) - Static method in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Builds a CREATED event for a freshly inserted entity.
CREATED - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.EventOp
A new entity instance was inserted on the server.
createdAt - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Creation timestamp (string form).
createdAt - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
When the request was created (string form), or null.
createdAt - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Timestamp the reservation row was created (DB DATETIME as string).
createReservation(int, long, String, String, int, VisitType, Long, boolean, String, String) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Creates a reservation.
CSS_PATH - Static variable in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
Classpath path to the single shared stylesheet.
current - Variable in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
People currently inside the park (sum of open-visit headcounts).
CURRENT_OCCUPANCY - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Fetch live occupancy for the employee's own park.
currentController - Variable in class client.app.Navigator
The active screen's controller (for firing its onHide before a swap).
currentEmployee(ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.VisitController
Recovers the park employee authenticated on this connection, for the server-side role check shared by every visit op.
currentId - Variable in class client.app.Navigator
Id of the currently displayed screen, or null if none yet.
currentOccupancy() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Fetches live occupancy for the employee's own park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only — no park id is sent, so the server derives it from the session).
currentOccupancy(int) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Computes a park's live occupancy: the sum of the headcounts of every open visit (those with exited_at IS NULL).
currentScreen() - Method in class client.app.Navigator
Returns the currently displayed screen, or null if none yet.
currentStaff(ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.ParkController
Recovers the staff user authenticated on this connection, for server-side role checks.
currentStaff(ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.ReportController
Recovers the staff user authenticated on this connection, for the server-side role check.
currentValue(ParamField) - Method in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Reads the loaded park's current value for the chosen field.
currentValue(ParkDTO, ParamField) - Method in class server.control.ParkController
Reads a park's current value for the given parameter field — the old_value recorded on a change request.
currentVisitorId - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
The visitor whose list is currently shown, so action handlers can refresh the same list after a successful confirm/cancel.
